---
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---
# 16S SEQUENCING OF URINE SAMPLES 
## 1. LIBRARIES -----

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ape)
library(vegan)
library(cluster)
library(phyloseq)
library(Boruta)
library(microViz)
library(factoextra)
library(survival)
library(lubridate)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(ggfortify)
library(dplyr)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyr)
library(graphics)
library(reshape2)
library(kselection)
library(stats)
library(pheatmap)
library(SCRuB)
library(survminer)
library(randomForest)
library(SIAMCAT)
library(corrr)
library(PERFect)
library(corrplot)
library(Hmisc)
```

## 2. SET SEED AND WORKING DIRECTORY AND LOAD RDATA FILE FROM DADA2 OUTPUTS ----

```{r)
set.seed(202) #If you are going to try all three methods in step 6, change seed for each of them for reproducibility
setwd("~/Desktop/16S_FinalPipeline_PERFect") #Change this to the appropriate working directory depending on step 6
load("16S_FinalPipeline.RData")
```

## 3. PRE-PROCESSING OF DATA ----
### 3.1. Define a function to remove "_Sxx_L001" from filenames ----

```{r}
remove_suffix <- function(file) {
  # Use regular expression to remove the "_Sxx_L001" part
  new_filename <- sub("_S\\d+_L001$", "", file)
  return(new_filename)
}
```

### 3.2 Apply the renaming function to the row names -----

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
rownames(seqtab.nochim.df) <- sapply(rownames(seqtab.nochim.df), remove_suffix)
```

### 3.3 Change the rownames on seqtab.npchim.df to match metadata ----

```{r}
new_row_names <- sub("^M-", "", rownames(seqtab.nochim.df))
new_row_names <- sub("-POST", "", new_row_names)
new_row_names <- sub("_", "-", new_row_names)
rownames(seqtab.nochim.df) <- new_row_names
rownames(seqtab.nochim.df) <- sub("^M-", "", rownames(seqtab.nochim.df))

colnames(seqtab.nochim.df) <- c(1:ncol(seqtab.nochim.df))
colnames(seqtab.nochim.df) <- paste("ASV", colnames(seqtab.nochim.df), sep = "_")
rownames(taxa.print.df) <- colnames(seqtab.nochim.df)
taxa.print.matrix <- as.matrix(taxa.print.df)

write.csv(file = "Seqtab_Nochim_df.csv", seqtab.nochim.df)
```

### 3.4. Formatting in Excel ----
Convert all the '_' in sample names to '-'. 
Then Change so the samples are in the right order (sort the whole dataframe by A to Z in excel for column A)]
Now read the newly formatted file again

```{r}
seqtab.nochim.df <- read.csv("Seqtab_Nochim_df.csv")
row.names(seqtab.nochim.df) <- seqtab.nochim.df$X
seqtab.nochim.df <- seqtab.nochim.df[,-1]
```

## 4.CONTAMINANT REMOVAL -----
### 4.1. SCRuB Package

```{r}
data <- as.matrix(seqtab.nochim.df)
scrub_metadata <- read.csv("Scrub_Metadata.csv", row.names = 1)
scr_out <- SCRuB(input_data = data, metadata = scrub_metadata)

scr_out_decontaminated_samples <- as.data.frame(scr_out$decontaminated_samples)
write.csv(file = "scrub_decontaminated_samples.csv", scr_out_decontaminated_samples)
scr_out_decontaminated_fraction <- as.data.frame(scr_out$p)
write.csv(file = "scrub_decontaminated_fraction.csv", scr_out_decontaminated_fraction)
scr_inner_iterations <- as.list(scr_out$inner_iterations)
scr_gamma <- as.data.frame(scr_inner_iterations[["Control"]][["gamma"]])
write.csv(file = "scrub_gamma.csv", scr_gamma)

seqtab.nochim.scrubbed <- scr_out_decontaminated_samples
```

156-5 for some reason always appears before 156-1 - have to see what that is about
### 4.2. Apply Salter Contaminant rules here ----
Upload metadata files for the 89 samples only and not the blanks and NTCs

```{r}
metadata <- read.csv("Metadata_16SDataset.csv", row.names=1)
```

#### 4.2.1 Phyloseq Object with Read Counts ----

```{r}
otu_tab <- otu_table(seqtab.nochim.scrubbed, taxa_are_rows = FALSE)
sample_dat <- sample_data(metadata)
tax_dat <- tax_table(taxa.print.matrix)
ps <- merge_phyloseq(otu_tab, sample_dat, tax_dat)
rank_names(ps)
```

#### 4.2.2 Genus Level Phyloseq Object ----

```{r}
ps_genus <- tax_glom(ps, "Genus")
p1 <- plot_bar(ps_genus, fill = "Genus")
ggsave(filename = 'Genus_Read_CountPlot.pdf', plot=p1, width=120, height=40, limitsize = FALSE)
p1

ps_species <- tax_glom(ps, "Species")
```

#### 4.2.3. Get Abundance Table at Genus Level and Species Level using the Genus and Species Phyloseq Object -----

```{r}
genus_abundance <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_genus))
genus_taxa <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_genus))
genus_names <- as.list(genus_taxa$Genus)
colnames(genus_abundance) <- genus_names
write.csv(file = "Genus_Abundance_Table_ReadCounts.csv", genus_abundance)

species_abundance <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_species))
species_taxa <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_species))
species_names <- as.list(species_taxa$Species)
colnames(species_abundance) <- species_names
write.csv(file = "Species_Abundance_Table_ReadCounts.csv", species_abundance)
```

#### 4.2.4 Generate the Salter Dataframes ----

```{r}
'%ni%' <- Negate('%in%')
consensus <- c("Afipia", "Aquabacterium", "Asticcacaulis", "Aurantimonas", "Beijerinckia", "Bosea", "Bradyrhizobium", "Brevundimonas", "Caulobacter", "Craurococcus", "Devosia", "Hoeflea", "Mesorhizobium", "Methylobacterium", "Novosphingobium", "Ochrobactrum", "Paracoccus", "Pedomicrobium", "Phyllobacterium", "Rhizobium", "Roseomonas", "Sphingobium", "Sphingomonas", "Sphingopyxis",
               "Acidovorax", "Azoarcus", "Azospira", "Burkholderia", "Comamonas", "Cupriavidus", "Curvibacter", "Delftia", "Duganella", "Herbaspirillum", "Janthinobacterium", "Kingella", "Leptothrix", "Limnobacter", "Massilia", "Methylophilus", "Methyloversatilis", "Oxalobacter", "Pelomonas", "Polaromonas", "Ralstonia", "Schlegelella", "Sulfuritalea", "Undibacterium", "Variovorax",
               "Enhydrobacter", "Nevskiae", "Pseudomonas", "Pseudoxanthomonas", "Psychrobacter", "Stenotrophomonas", "Xanthomonas",
               "Aeromicrobium", "Arthrobacter", "Beutenbergia", "Brevibacterium", "Curtobacterium", "Dietzia", "Geodermatophilus", "Janibacter", "Microbacterium", "Microlunatus", "Patulibacter", "Propionibacterium", "Rhodococcus", "Tsukamurella",
               "Abiotrophia", "Bacillus", "Brevibacillus", "Brochothrix", "Paenibacillus",
               "Chryseobacterium", "Dyadobacter", "Flavobacterium", "Hydrotalea", "Niastella", "Olivibacter", "Pedobacter", "Wautersiella",
               "Deinococcus")


contaminants <- c("Afipia", "Aquabacterium", "Asticcacaulis", "Aurantimonas", "Beijerinckia", "Bosea", "Bradyrhizobium", "Brevundimonas", "Caulobacter", "Craurococcus", "Devosia", "Hoeflea", "Mesorhizobium", "Methylobacterium", "Novosphingobium", "Ochrobactrum", "Paracoccus", "Pedomicrobium", "Phyllobacterium", "Rhizobium", "Roseomonas", "Sphingobium", "Sphingomonas", "Sphingopyxis",
                  "Acidovorax", "Azoarcus", "Azospira", "Burkholderia", "Comamonas", "Cupriavidus", "Curvibacter", "Delftia", "Duganella", "Herbaspirillum", "Janthinobacterium", "Kingella", "Leptothrix", "Limnobacter", "Massilia", "Methylophilus", "Methyloversatilis", "Oxalobacter", "Pelomonas", "Polaromonas", "Ralstonia", "Schlegelella", "Sulfuritalea", "Undibacterium", "Variovorax",
                  "Acinetobacter", "Enhydrobacter", "Enterobacter", "Escherichia", "Nevskiae", "Pseudomonas", "Pseudoxanthomonas", "Psychrobacter", "Stenotrophomonas", "Xanthomonas",
                  "Aeromicrobium", "Arthrobacter", "Beutenbergia", "Brevibacterium", "Corynebacterium", "Curtobacterium", "Dietzia", "Geodermatophilus", "Janibacter", "Kocuria", "Microbacterium", "Micrococcus", "Microlunatus", "Patulibacter", "Propionibacterium", "Rhodococcus", "Tsukamurella",
                  "Abiotrophia", "Bacillus", "Brevibacillus", "Brochothrix", "Facklamia", "Paenibacillus", "Streptococcus",
                  "Chryseobacterium", "Dyadobacter", "Flavobacterium", "Hydrotalea", "Niastella", "Olivibacter", "Pedobacter", "Wautersiella",
                  "Deinococcus")
salter_nocontaminants <- subset(genus_abundance, select = names(genus_abundance) %ni% contaminants)
salter_consensus <- subset(genus_abundance, select = names(genus_abundance) %ni% consensus)
salter_allcontaminants <- genus_abundance

write.csv(file = "No_Contaminants.csv", salter_nocontaminants)
write.csv(file = "Consensus.csv", salter_consensus)
write.csv(file = "All_Contaminants.csv", salter_allcontaminants)
```

# 5. KEEP ONLY HILA SAMPLES (CANCER SAMPLES) ----
If needed, you can further shorten the list by removing Advanced (A) samples

```{r}
hila_samples_metadata <- metadata %>% filter(category_at_initial_urine_collection == "H" | 
                                               category_at_initial_urine_collection == "I" |
                                               category_at_initial_urine_collection == "L" |
                                               category_at_initial_urine_collection == "A")

hila_samples <- c(rownames(hila_samples_metadata))

salter_nocontaminants_hila <- salter_nocontaminants %>% filter(rownames(salter_nocontaminants) %in% hila_samples)
salter_consensus_hila <- salter_consensus %>% filter(rownames(salter_consensus) %in% hila_samples)
salter_allcontaminants_hila <- salter_allcontaminants %>% filter(rownames(salter_allcontaminants) %in% hila_samples)
```

# 6. FILTRATION CRITERIA FOR PRESENCE ABSENCE (SELECT ANY ONE FROM 6.1 TO 6.3 NOT ALL) ----
If you are looking to do work with abundance data then go down to section 19 for SIAMCAT

## 6.1 1% CUTOFF ----
Chosen because the cutoffs have been arbitarily chosen usually and I found a paper that assigns 1% to rare taxa.
Have tried 5% before but that takes off too many taxa that are important
Change working directory to appropriate method between 6.1 and 6.3 to avoid confusion of results

### 6.1.1 Convert all of these dataframes into relative abundance ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants.rel <- decostand(salter_nocontaminants_hila, method='total', MARGIN = 1)
salter_consensus.rel <- decostand(salter_consensus_hila, method='total', MARGIN = 1)
salter_allcontaminants.rel<- decostand(salter_allcontaminants_hila, method='total', MARGIN = 1)
```

### 6.1.2 Remove those values that are less than 1% and convert to presence/absence ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants.rel.PA<- salter_nocontaminants.rel %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 0.01))
salter_consensus.rel.PA<- salter_consensus.rel %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 0.01))
salter_allcontaminants.rel.PA<- salter_allcontaminants.rel %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 0.01))
```

### 6.1.3 Only select genera with more than 2 hits (presence) ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants.rel.PA2 <- salter_nocontaminants.rel.PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
salter_consensus.rel.PA2 <- salter_consensus.rel.PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
salter_allcontaminants.rel.PA2 <- salter_allcontaminants.rel.PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
```

### 6.1.4 Write CSV Files for presence-absence matrices ----

```{r}
write.csv(file = "Salter_NoContaminants_PA.csv", salter_nocontaminants.rel.PA2)
write.csv(file = "Salter_Consensus_PA.csv", salter_consensus.rel.PA2)
write.csv(file = "Salter_AllContaminants_PA.csv", salter_allcontaminants.rel.PA2)
```

### 6.1.5 Preprocessing of the Data ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean <- salter_nocontaminants.rel.PA2[rowSums(salter_nocontaminants.rel.PA2) > 0, ]
salter_nocontaminants_clean <- na.omit(salter_nocontaminants_clean)

salter_consensus_clean <- salter_consensus.rel.PA2[rowSums(salter_consensus.rel.PA2) > 0, ]
salter_consensus_clean <- na.omit(salter_consensus_clean)

salter_allcontaminants_clean <- salter_allcontaminants.rel.PA2[rowSums(salter_allcontaminants.rel.PA2) > 0, ]
salter_allcontaminants_clean <- na.omit(salter_allcontaminants_clean)
```

## 6.2. 20 READS CUTOFF ----
### 6.2.1. Filter any reads <20 to 0 and > 20 to 1 ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_20_PA <- salter_nocontaminants_hila %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 20))
salter_consensus_20_PA<- salter_consensus_hila %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 20))
salter_allcontaminants_20_PA<- salter_allcontaminants_hila %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 20))
```

### 6.2.2 Only select genera with more than 2 hits (presence) ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_20_PA2 <- salter_nocontaminants_20_PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
salter_consensus_20_PA2<- salter_consensus_20_PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
salter_allcontaminants_20_PA2 <- salter_allcontaminants_20_PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
```

### 6.2.3 Write CSV Files for presence-absence matrices ----

```{r}
write.csv(file = "Salter_NoContaminants_20_PA.csv", salter_nocontaminants_20_PA2)
write.csv(file = "Salter_Consensus_20_PA.csv", salter_consensus_20_PA2)
write.csv(file = "Salter_AllContaminants_20_PA.csv", salter_allcontaminants_20_PA2)
```

### 6.2.4 Preprocessing of the Data ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean <- salter_nocontaminants_20_PA2[rowSums(salter_nocontaminants_20_PA2) > 0, ]
salter_nocontaminants_clean <- na.omit(salter_nocontaminants_clean)

salter_consensus_clean <- salter_consensus_20_PA2[rowSums(salter_consensus_20_PA2) > 0, ]
salter_consensus_clean <- na.omit(salter_consensus_clean)

salter_allcontaminants_clean <- salter_allcontaminants_20_PA2[rowSums(salter_allcontaminants_20_PA2) > 0, ]
salter_allcontaminants_clean <- na.omit(salter_allcontaminants_clean)
```

## 6.3 PERFect ----
### 6.3.1 Use PERFect to get rid of genera that do not affect variance too much ----

```{r}
perfect_perm_nocontaminants <- PERFect_perm(X = salter_nocontaminants_hila, normalize = "pres", algorithm = "full")
perfect_perm_nocontaminants$pvals
perfect_perm_nocontaminants_pvals <- as.data.frame(perfect_perm_nocontaminants$pvals)
perfect_nocontaminants_significant <- perfect_perm_nocontaminants_pvals %>% filter(`perfect_perm_nocontaminants$pvals` < 0.05)
perfect_nocontaminants.df <- as.data.frame(perfect_perm_nocontaminants$filtX)

perfect_perm_consensus <- PERFect_perm(X = salter_consensus_hila, normalize = "pres", algorithm = "full")
perfect_perm_consensus$pvals
perfect_perm_consensus_pvals <- as.data.frame(perfect_perm_consensus$pvals)
perfect_consensus_significant <- perfect_perm_consensus_pvals %>% filter(`perfect_perm_consensus$pvals` < 0.05)
perfect_consensus.df <- as.data.frame(perfect_perm_consensus$filtX)

perfect_perm_allcontaminants <- PERFect_perm(X = salter_allcontaminants_hila, normalize = "pres", algorithm = "full")
perfect_perm_allcontaminants$pvals
perfect_perm_allcontaminants_pvals <- as.data.frame(perfect_perm_allcontaminants$pvals)
perfect_allcontaminants_significant <- perfect_perm_allcontaminants_pvals %>% filter(`perfect_perm_allcontaminants$pvals` < 0.05)
perfect_allcontaminants.df <- as.data.frame(perfect_perm_allcontaminants$filtX)
```

### 6.3.2 Convert anything with reads to 1 because PERFect has already done the filtering out of a lot of taxa ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_PA <- perfect_nocontaminants.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 0))
salter_consensus_PA<- perfect_consensus.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 0))
salter_allcontaminants_PA<- perfect_allcontaminants.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, ~1 * (. > 0))
```

### 6.3.3 Only select genera with more than 2 hits (presence) ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_PA2 <- salter_nocontaminants_PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
salter_consensus_PA2<- salter_consensus_PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
salter_allcontaminants_PA2 <- salter_allcontaminants_PA %>% select_if(function(col) is.character(col) || (is.numeric(col) && sum(col) >=2))
```

### 6.3.4 Write CSV Files for presence-absence matrices ----

```{r}
write.csv(file = "Salter_NoContaminants_PERFect.csv", salter_nocontaminants_PA2)
write.csv(file = "Salter_Consensus_PERFect.csv", salter_consensus_PA2)
write.csv(file = "Salter_AllContaminants_PERFect.csv", salter_allcontaminants_PA2)
```

### 6.3.5 Preprocessing of the Data ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean <- salter_nocontaminants_PA2[rowSums(salter_nocontaminants_PA2) > 0, ]
salter_nocontaminants_clean <- na.omit(salter_nocontaminants_clean)

salter_consensus_clean <- salter_consensus_PA2[rowSums(salter_consensus_PA2) > 0, ]
salter_consensus_clean <- na.omit(salter_consensus_clean)

salter_allcontaminants_clean <- salter_allcontaminants_PA2[rowSums(salter_allcontaminants_20_PA2) > 0, ]
salter_allcontaminants_clean <- na.omit(salter_allcontaminants_clean)
```

CHECKPOINT ---- 
AT THE END OF THIS STEP, NO MATTER WHICH METHOD YOU CHOOSE THE _clean dataframes should be the three you choose to work with
#7. NMDS Plot for Genus Presence Absence Matrix ----

```{r}
class(salter_nocontaminants_clean)
salter_nocontaminants_matrix <- as.matrix(salter_nocontaminants_clean)
nmds <- metaMDS(salter_nocontaminants_matrix, distance = "jaccard")
plot(nmds)
data.scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds)$sites)
plot(data.scores, pch = 16, col = "blue", main = "NMDS Plot of Jaccard Distances- FWD Reads Only (No Salter Contaminants Present)", sub = "Stress = 0.192045")
text(data.scores, labels = rownames(data.scores), pos = 1, cex = 0.5)
head(data.scores)

class(salter_consensus_clean)
salter_consensus_matrix <- as.matrix(salter_consensus_clean)
nmds <- metaMDS(salter_consensus_matrix, distance = "jaccard")
plot(nmds)
data.scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds)$sites)
plot(data.scores, pch = 16, col = "blue", main = "NMDS Plot of Jaccard Distances- FWD Reads Only (Consensus Contaminants Present)", sub = c("Stress=", paste(nmds$stress)))
text(data.scores, labels = rownames(data.scores), pos = 1, cex = 0.5)
head(data.scores)

class(salter_allcontaminants_clean)
salter_allcontaminants_matrix <- as.matrix(salter_allcontaminants_clean)
nmds <- metaMDS(salter_allcontaminants_matrix, distance = "jaccard")
plot(nmds)
data.scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds)$sites)
plot(data.scores, pch = 16, col = "blue", main = "NMDS Plot of Jaccard Distances- FWD Reads Only (All Contaminants Present)", sub = "Stress = 0.1872558")
text(data.scores, labels = rownames(data.scores), pos = 1, cex = 0.5)
head(data.scores)
```

# 8. Jaccard distances ----

```{r}
jaccard_dist_nocontaminants <- vegdist(salter_nocontaminants_clean, method = "jaccard")
jaccard_dist_matrix <- as.matrix(jaccard_dist_nocontaminants)
pheatmap(jaccard_dist_matrix, 
         cluster_rows = TRUE,  # Optional: Hierarchical clustering of rows
         cluster_cols = TRUE,  # Optional: Hierarchical clustering of columns
         display_numbers = FALSE,  # Display values in the heatmap
         fontsize_row = 4, fontsize_col = 4, angle_col = 45,
         main = "Jaccard Dissimilarity Plot for No Contaminant Dataframe",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "blue"))(50)) 

jaccard_dist_consensus <- vegdist(salter_consensus_clean, method = "jaccard")
jaccard_dist_matrix <- as.matrix(jaccard_dist_consensus)
pheatmap(jaccard_dist_matrix, 
         cluster_rows = TRUE,  # Optional: Hierarchical clustering of rows
         cluster_cols = TRUE,  # Optional: Hierarchical clustering of columns
         display_numbers = FALSE,  # Display values in the heatmap
         fontsize_row = 3, fontsize_col = 3, angle_col = 45,
         main = "Jaccard Dissimilarity Plot for Consensus Dataframe",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "red"))(50)) 

jaccard_dist_allcontaminants <- vegdist(salter_allcontaminants_clean, method = "jaccard")
jaccard_dist_matrix <- as.matrix(jaccard_dist_allcontaminants)
pheatmap(jaccard_dist_matrix, 
         cluster_rows = TRUE,  # Optional: Hierarchical clustering of rows
         cluster_cols = TRUE,  # Optional: Hierarchical clustering of columns
         display_numbers = FALSE,  # Display values in the heatmap
         fontsize_row = 3, fontsize_col = 3, angle_col = 45,
         main = "Jaccard Dissimilarity Plot for All Contaminants Dataframe",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "red"))(50))
```

# 9. K-Means Clustering ----

```{r}
fviz_nbclust(salter_nocontaminants_clean, kmeans, method='silhouette') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_nocontaminants_clean, kmeans, method='gap_stat') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_nocontaminants_clean, kmeans, method='wss') 

fviz_nbclust(salter_consensus_clean, kmeans, method='silhouette') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_consensus_clean, kmeans, method='gap_stat') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_consensus_clean, kmeans, method='wss') 

fviz_nbclust(salter_allcontaminants_clean, kmeans, method='silhouette') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_allcontaminants_clean, kmeans, method='gap_stat') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_allcontaminants_clean, kmeans, method='wss') 
```

For all three databases, 2 seems to be the best number of clusters based on 2 out of the 3 methods

```{r}
kselection(salter_nocontaminants_clean, fun_cluster = stats::kmeans, max_centers = 15, k_threshold = 0.85)
kselection(salter_consensus_clean, fun_cluster = stats::kmeans, max_centers = 15, k_threshold = 0.85)
kselection(salter_allcontaminants_clean, fun_cluster = stats::kmeans, max_centers = 15, k_threshold = 0.85)
```

All three find two clusters

```{r}
kmeans_nocontaminants <- kmeans(salter_nocontaminants_clean, 2, nstart = 20)
kmeans_nocontaminants

kmeans_consensus <- kmeans(salter_consensus_clean, 2, nstart = 20)
kmeans_consensus

kmeans_allcontaminants <- kmeans(salter_allcontaminants_clean, 2, nstart = 20)
kmeans_allcontaminants
```

# 10. Add cluster data to the original dataframe ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean$cluster <- as.factor(kmeans_nocontaminants$cluster)
salter_consensus_clean$cluster <- as.factor(kmeans_consensus$cluster)
salter_allcontaminants_clean$cluster <- as.factor(kmeans_allcontaminants$cluster)
```

# 11. NMDS Plots with Clusters ----

```{r}
jaccard_nocontaminants_dist <- vegdist(salter_nocontaminants_clean[, -ncol(salter_nocontaminants_clean)], method = "jaccard")
nmds_nocontaminants_result <- metaMDS(jaccard_nocontaminants_dist, k = 2, trymax = 10000)
nmds_nocontaminants_df <- as.data.frame(nmds_nocontaminants_result$points)
nmds_nocontaminants_df$cluster <- salter_nocontaminants_clean$cluster  # Add cluster information to NMDS dataframe
nmds_stress_nocontaminants <- nmds_nocontaminants_result$stress
ggplot(nmds_nocontaminants_df, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = cluster, label = rownames(salter_nocontaminants_clean))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters - No contaminant", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_nocontaminants, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)

jaccard_consensus_dist <- vegdist(salter_consensus_clean[, -ncol(salter_consensus_clean)], method = "jaccard")
nmds_consensus_result <- metaMDS(jaccard_consensus_dist, k = 2, trymax = 10000)
nmds_consensus_df <- as.data.frame(nmds_consensus_result$points)
nmds_consensus_df$cluster <- salter_consensus_clean$cluster  # Add cluster information to NMDS dataframe
nmds_stress_consensus <- nmds_consensus_result$stress
ggplot(nmds_consensus_df, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = cluster, label = rownames(salter_consensus_clean))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters - Consensus", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_consensus, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)

jaccard_allcontaminants_dist <- vegdist(salter_allcontaminants_clean[, -ncol(salter_allcontaminants_clean)], method = "jaccard")
nmds_allcontaminants_result <- metaMDS(jaccard_allcontaminants_dist, k = 2, trymax = 10000)
nmds_allcontaminants_df <- as.data.frame(nmds_allcontaminants_result$points)
nmds_allcontaminants_df$cluster <- salter_allcontaminants_clean$cluster  # Add cluster information to NMDS dataframe
nmds_stress_allcontaminants <- nmds_allcontaminants_result$stress
ggplot(nmds_allcontaminants_df, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = cluster, label = rownames(salter_allcontaminants_clean))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters - All contaminants", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_allcontaminants, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)
```

At this point, what you need is to add cluster data, ABBS data and Progression data to the metadata
# 12. Add cluster data, ABBS data and Progression data to the metadata ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata <- cbind(salter_nocontaminants_clean, Overall_Progression = hila_samples_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_consensus_clean_metadata <- cbind(salter_consensus_clean, Overall_Progression = hila_samples_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata <- cbind(salter_allcontaminants_clean, Overall_Progression = hila_samples_metadata$Overall_Progression)
```

CHECKPOINT ----
You may have to double check the genera in the following lines of code as some of the may have been eliminated depending on the method chosen in step 6
For choosing 6.1 - 2% Cutoff - Remove the following genera from each dataframe
6.1.a - No contaminants doesnt have Porphyromonas, Peptoniphilus E and C (Only Peptoniphilus E for 1)
6.1.b - Consensus doesnt have the same as above
6.1.c - All contaminants doesnt have the same as above
For choosing 6.2 - 20 Read Cutoff - all the organisms from above are present so do not take out the three mentioned
6.3 - For PERFect add the organisms missing in 6.1

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata <- salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata %>% mutate(abbs = Ezakiella + Fenollaria + Anaerococcus + Porphyromonas_A + Porphyromonas + Peptoniphilus_C + Peptoniphilus_A +Fusobacterium)
salter_consensus_clean_metadata <- salter_consensus_clean_metadata %>% mutate(abbs = Ezakiella + Fenollaria + Anaerococcus + Porphyromonas + Peptoniphilus_C + Porphyromonas_A + Peptoniphilus_A + Fusobacterium)
salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata <- salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata %>% mutate(abbs = Ezakiella + Fenollaria + Anaerococcus + Porphyromonas_A + Porphyromonas + Peptoniphilus_C + Peptoniphilus_A +Fusobacterium)
```

# 13. Survival Analysis based on ABBS load ----
## 13.1 Prepare the Metadata for survival analysis based on progression ----

```{r}
metadata_nodeath <- read.csv("Metadata_16SDataset_NoDeath.csv", row.names=1)

metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$date_of_death <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$date_of_death, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression_Date <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression_Date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$last_follow_up_date <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$last_follow_up_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$days_to_last_follow_up <- metadata_nodeath$last_follow_up_date - metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment
metadata_nodeath$days_to_progression <- metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression_Date - metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment

table(metadata_nodeath$vital_status)
table(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression)

metadata_nodeath$progressed <- ifelse(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression == "Progressed", TRUE, FALSE)
table(metadata_nodeath$progressed)
metadata_nodeath$overall_progression_free <- ifelse(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression == "Not_Progressed",
                                                    metadata_nodeath$days_to_last_follow_up,
                                                    metadata_nodeath$days_to_progression)
```

HILA samples Metadata 

```{r}
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath <- metadata_nodeath %>% filter(rownames(metadata_nodeath) %in% hila_samples)
```

## 13.2 Add ABBS data to the metadata ----

```{r}
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath$abbs <- c(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$abbs)
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants <- hila_samples_metadata_nodeath[, 1:46]
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus <- hila_samples_metadata_nodeath[, 1:46]
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants <- hila_samples_metadata_nodeath[, 1:46]

hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$abbs <- c(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$abbs)
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$abbs <- c(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$abbs)
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$abbs <- c(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$abbs)

abbs_median_nocontaminants <- median(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$abbs)
abbs_median_consensus <- median(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$abbs)
abbs_median_allcontaminants <- median(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$abbs)
```

Check the median values for each of them and modify the following lines accordingly

```{r}
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$abbs_load <- 
  ifelse(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$abbs >= 1, "High", "Low")
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$abbs_load <- 
  ifelse(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$abbs >= 1, "High", "Low")
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$abbs_load <- 
  ifelse(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$abbs >= 1, "High", "Low")
```

## 13.3 Fit the Survival Curve to Progression ----

```{r}
survfit_nocontaminants_nodeath <- survfit(Surv(overall_progression_free, progressed) ~ abbs_load, data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants)
survfit_nocontaminants_nodeath
ggsurvplot(survfit_nocontaminants_nodeath,
           data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants,
           pval = TRUE,
           risk.table = TRUE)

survfit_consensus_nodeath <- survfit(Surv(overall_progression_free, progressed) ~ abbs_load, data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus)
survfit_consensus_nodeath
ggsurvplot(survfit_consensus_nodeath,
           data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus,
           pval = TRUE,
           risk.table = TRUE)

survfit_allcontaminants_nodeath <- survfit(Surv(overall_progression_free, progressed) ~ abbs_load, data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants)
survfit_allcontaminants_nodeath
ggsurvplot(survfit_allcontaminants_nodeath,
           data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants,
           pval = TRUE,
           risk.table = TRUE)
```

# 14. Survfit object into Boruta ----
## 14.1 Create the data required for this ----
By merging the metadata and the genus presence-absence table

```{r}
combined_data_nocontaminants <- merge(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants, 
                                      salter_nocontaminants_clean, by = "row.names")
rownames(combined_data_nocontaminants) <- combined_data_nocontaminants$Row.names
combined_data_nocontaminants$Row.names <- NULL

combined_data_consensus <- merge(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus, 
                                 salter_consensus_clean, by = "row.names")
rownames(combined_data_consensus) <- combined_data_consensus$Row.names
combined_data_consensus$Row.names <- NULL

combined_data_allcontaminants <- merge(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants, 
                                       salter_allcontaminants_clean, by = "row.names")
rownames(combined_data_allcontaminants) <- combined_data_allcontaminants$Row.names
combined_data_allcontaminants$Row.names <- NULL
```

## 14.2 Encode 'progressed' as factors - not sure about the latter ----

```{r}
combined_data_nocontaminants$progressed <- as.factor(combined_data_nocontaminants$progressed)
combined_data_consensus$progressed <- as.factor(combined_data_consensus$progressed)
combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed <- as.factor(combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed)
```

## 14.3 Survival Object ----

```{r}
survival_obj_abbs_nocontaminants <- Surv(combined_data_nocontaminants$overall_progression_free,
                                         combined_data_nocontaminants$progressed)
survival_obj_abbs_consensus <- Surv(combined_data_consensus$overall_progression_free,
                                         combined_data_consensus$progressed)
survival_obj_abbs_allcontaminants <- Surv(combined_data_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free,
                                         combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed)
```

## 14.4 Boruta ----

```{r}
boruta_abbs_nocontaminant_survfit <- Boruta(nocontaminants_subset, survival_obj_abbs_nocontaminants, 
                                       pValue = 0.05, maxRuns = 10000, doTrace = 2)

boruta_abbs_consensus_survfit <- Boruta(consensus_subset, survival_obj_abbs_consensus, 
                                   pValue = 0.05, maxRuns = 10000, doTrace = 2)

boruta_abbs_allcontaminants_survfit <- Boruta(allcontaminants_subset, survival_obj_abbs_allcontaminants, 
                                         pValue = 0.05, maxRuns = 10000, doTrace = 2)

boruta_abbs_nocontaminants_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_abbs_nocontaminant_survfit$finalDecision)
boruta_abbs_consensus_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_abbs_consensus_survfit$finalDecision)
boruta_abbs_allcontaminants_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_abbs_allcontaminants_survfit$finalDecision)

write.csv(file = "Boruta_ABBS_Nocontaminants_FinalDecision.csv", boruta_abbs_nocontaminants_finaldecision)
write.csv(file = "Boruta_ABBS_Consensus_FinalDecision.csv", boruta_abbs_consensus_finaldecision)
write.csv(file = "Boruta_ABBS_Allcontaminants_FinalDecision.csv", boruta_abbs_allcontaminants_finaldecision)
```

## 14.5 NMDS based on endpoint ----

```{r}
nmds_progress_metadata <- read.csv("Progression_NMDS_Metadata.csv", row.names = 1)
```

This metadata file has standardised progression terminology so that it can be factorised 
### 14.5.1 Keep all samples that have "No progress" in them ----

```{r}
nmds_nocontaminants_df$progress <- c(nmds_progress_metadata$Overall_Progression)
nmds_nocontaminants_df$progress_reason <- c(nmds_progress_metadata$Progress_Reason)
nmds_stress_nocontaminants <- nmds_nocontaminants_result$stress
ggplot(nmds_nocontaminants_df, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = progress_reason, label = rownames(salter_nocontaminants_clean))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters with Progress Info - No contaminant Dataframe", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_nocontaminants, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red", "black", "green", "orange", "pink", "cyan", "darkblue")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)

nmds_consensus_df$progress <- c(nmds_progress_metadata$Overall_Progression)
nmds_consensus_df$progress_reason <- c(nmds_progress_metadata$Progress_Reason)
nmds_stress_consensus <- nmds_consensus_result$stress
ggplot(nmds_consensus_df, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = progress_reason, label = rownames(salter_consensus_clean))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters with Progress Info - Consensus Dataframe", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_consensus, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red", "black", "green", "orange", "pink", "cyan", "darkblue")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)


nmds_allcontaminants_df$progress <- c(nmds_progress_metadata$Overall_Progression)
nmds_allcontaminants_df$progress_reason <- c(nmds_progress_metadata$Progress_Reason)
nmds_stress_allcontaminants <- nmds_allcontaminants_result$stress
ggplot(nmds_allcontaminants_df, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = progress_reason, label = rownames(salter_allcontaminants_clean))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters with Progress Info - All Contaminants Dataframe", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_allcontaminants, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red", "black", "green", "orange", "pink", "cyan", "darkblue")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)
```

### 14.5.2 Remove all the no progress and plot the remaining ----

```{r}
nmds_nocontaminants_df_progress <- nmds_nocontaminants_df %>% filter(progress_reason != "No_progress")
nmds_consensus_df_progress <- nmds_consensus_df %>% filter(progress_reason != "No_progress")
nmds_allcontaminants_df_progress <- nmds_allcontaminants_df %>% filter(progress_reason != "No_progress")

ggplot(nmds_nocontaminants_df_progress, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = progress_reason, label = rownames(nmds_nocontaminants_df_progress))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters with Progress Info (Only Progressed Samples) - No Contaminants Dataframe", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_nocontaminants, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red", "black", "green", "orange", "pink", "cyan", "darkblue")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)

ggplot(nmds_consensus_df_progress, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = progress_reason, label = rownames(nmds_consensus_df_progress))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters with Progress Info (Only Progressed Samples) - Consensus Dataframe", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_consensus, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red", "black", "green", "orange", "pink", "cyan", "darkblue")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)

ggplot(nmds_allcontaminants_df_progress, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2, color = progress_reason, label = rownames(nmds_allcontaminants_df_progress))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "NMDS Plot with K-means Clusters with Progress Info (Only Progressed Samples) - All Contaminants Dataframe", 
       subtitle = paste("NMDS Stress =", round(nmds_stress_allcontaminants, 3)), x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "red", "black", "green", "orange", "pink", "cyan", "darkblue")) +
  geom_text(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width =0.9), hjust=1.5)
```

# 15. Tabulate and Plot Progression Samples in Each of the Clusters -----
## 15.1 Take the salter_nocontaminants_clean dataframe and add the progression and metastasis columns from metadata to it ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata <- cbind(salter_nocontaminants_clean, Overall_Progression = hila_samples_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_nocontaminants_cluster1 <- salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata %>% filter(cluster == 1)
salter_nocontaminants_cluster2 <- salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata %>% filter(cluster == 2)

salter_consensus_clean_metadata <- cbind(salter_consensus_clean, Overall_Progression = hila_samples_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_consensus_cluster1 <- salter_consensus_clean_metadata %>% filter(cluster == 1)
salter_consensus_cluster2 <- salter_consensus_clean_metadata %>% filter(cluster == 2)

salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata <- cbind(salter_allcontaminants_clean, Overall_Progression = hila_samples_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_allcontaminants_cluster1 <- salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata %>% filter(cluster == 1)
salter_allcontaminants_cluster2 <- salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata %>% filter(cluster == 2)
```

## 15.2 Tables to see Progression in each of the clusters ----

```{r}
table(salter_nocontaminants_cluster1$Overall_Progression)
table(salter_nocontaminants_cluster2$Overall_Progression)

table(salter_consensus_cluster1$Overall_Progression)
table(salter_consensus_cluster2$Overall_Progression)

table(salter_allcontaminants_cluster1$Overall_Progression)
table(salter_allcontaminants_cluster2$Overall_Progression)
```

## 15.3 Plot it into a bar graph ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_barplot <- salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata %>%
  group_by(cluster, Overall_Progression) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()
salter_nocontaminants_barplot <- salter_nocontaminants_barplot %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()
ggplot(salter_nocontaminants_barplot, aes(x = as.factor(cluster), y = percentage, fill = Overall_Progression)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "Cluster", y = "Percentage", fill = "Progression Status") +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Progressed and Not Progressed Samples (No Contaminants)") +
  theme_minimal()


salter_consensus_barplot <- salter_consensus_clean_metadata %>%
  group_by(cluster, Overall_Progression) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()
salter_consensus_barplot <- salter_consensus_barplot %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()
ggplot(salter_consensus_barplot, aes(x = as.factor(cluster), y = percentage, fill = Overall_Progression)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "Cluster", y = "Percentage", fill = "Progression Status") +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Progressed and Not Progressed Samples (Consensus)") +
  theme_minimal()


salter_allcontaminants_barplot <- salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata %>%
  group_by(cluster, Overall_Progression) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()
salter_allcontaminants_barplot <- salter_allcontaminants_barplot %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()
ggplot(salter_allcontaminants_barplot, aes(x = as.factor(cluster), y = percentage, fill = Overall_Progression)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "Cluster", y = "Percentage", fill = "Progression Status") +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Progressed and Not Progressed Samples (All Contaminants)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# 16. Boruta based on clusters ----
## 16.1 Encode metastasis and cluster as factors ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster <- as.factor(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster)
salter_consensus_clean_metadata$cluster <- as.factor(salter_consensus_clean_metadata$cluster)
salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster <- as.factor(salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster)

salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$Overall_Progression <- as.factor(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_consensus_clean_metadata$Overall_Progression <- as.factor(salter_consensus_clean_metadata$Overall_Progression)
salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata$Overall_Progression <- as.factor(salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata$Overall_Progression)
```

## 16.2 Create a Boruta dataset - you want to find out which ones are associated with which cluster -----

```{r}
boruta_nocontaminants <- subset(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata, select = -c(cluster, Overall_Progression))
nocontaminants_target <- salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster
boruta_nocontaminants_result <- Boruta(salter_nocontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster ~ ., data = boruta_nocontaminants, doTrace = 2, maxRuns=10000)
boruta_nocontaminants_result
plot(boruta_nocontaminants_result)
boruta_nocontaminants_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_nocontaminants_result$finalDecision)
boruta_nocontaminants_ImpHistory <- as.data.frame(boruta_nocontaminants_result$ImpHistory)

boruta_consensus <- subset(salter_consensus_clean_metadata, select = -c(cluster, Overall_Progression))
consensus_target <- salter_consensus_clean_metadata$cluster
boruta_consensus_result <- Boruta(salter_consensus_clean_metadata$cluster ~ ., data = boruta_consensus, doTrace = 2, maxRuns=10000)
boruta_consensus_result
plot(boruta_consensus_result)
boruta_consensus_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_consensus_result$finalDecision)
boruta_consensus_ImpHistory <- as.data.frame(boruta_consensus_result$ImpHistory)

boruta_allcontaminants <- subset(salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata, select = -c(cluster, Overall_Progression))
allcontaminants_target <- salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster
boruta_allcontaminants_result <- Boruta(salter_allcontaminants_clean_metadata$cluster ~ ., data = boruta_allcontaminants, doTrace = 2, maxRuns=10000)
boruta_allcontaminants_result
plot(boruta_allcontaminants_result)
boruta_allcontaminants_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_allcontaminants_result$finalDecision)
boruta_allcontaminants_ImpHistory <- as.data.frame(boruta_allcontaminants_result$ImpHistory)
```

## 16.3 Check the Boruta results for each of the dataframes and see which bacteria are important in determining clusters ----

```{r}
boruta_nocontaminants_confirmed <- boruta_nocontaminants_finaldecision %>% filter(boruta_nocontaminants_finaldecision$`boruta_nocontaminants_result$finalDecision`== "Confirmed")
boruta_consensus_confirmed <- boruta_consensus_finaldecision %>% filter(boruta_consensus_finaldecision$`boruta_consensus_result$finalDecision`== "Confirmed")
boruta_allcontaminants_confirmed <- boruta_allcontaminants_finaldecision %>% filter(boruta_allcontaminants_finaldecision$`boruta_allcontaminants_result$finalDecision`== "Confirmed")

genus_nocontaminants_confirmed <- c(rownames(boruta_nocontaminants_confirmed))
genus_consensus_confirmed <- c(rownames(boruta_consensus_confirmed))
genus_allcontaminants_confirmed <- c(rownames(boruta_allcontaminants_confirmed))

write.csv(file = "Boruta_Clusters_NoContaminants_Confirmed.csv", genus_nocontaminants_confirmed)
write.csv(file = "Boruta_Clusters_Consensus_Confirmed.csv", genus_consensus_confirmed)
write.csv(file = "Boruta_Clusters_AllContaminants_Confirmed.csv", genus_allcontaminants_confirmed)
```

## 16.4 Get the Boruta importance for only positives ----

```{r}
confirmed_nocontaminants <- getSelectedAttributes(boruta_nocontaminants_result, withTentative = F)
confirmed_importance_nocontaminants <- attStats(boruta_nocontaminants_result)
confirmed_importance_nocontaminants <- confirmed_importance_nocontaminants[confirmed_importance_nocontaminants$decision == "Confirmed", ]
ggplot(confirmed_importance_nocontaminants, aes(x = reorder(rownames(confirmed_importance_nocontaminants), meanImp), y = meanImp)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "skyblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Importance of Confirmed Genera by Boruta - No contaminants",
       x = "Features",
       y = "Mean Importance")

confirmed_consensus <- getSelectedAttributes(boruta_consensus_result, withTentative = F)
confirmed_importance_consensus <- attStats(boruta_consensus_result)
confirmed_importance_consensus <- confirmed_importance_consensus[confirmed_importance_consensus$decision == "Confirmed", ]
ggplot(confirmed_importance_consensus, aes(x = reorder(rownames(confirmed_importance_consensus), meanImp), y = meanImp)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "orange") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Importance of Confirmed Genera by Boruta - Consensus",
       x = "Features",
       y = "Mean Importance")

confirmed_allcontaminants <- getSelectedAttributes(boruta_allcontaminants_result, withTentative = F)
confirmed_importance_allcontaminants <- attStats(boruta_allcontaminants_result)
confirmed_importance_allcontaminants <- confirmed_importance_allcontaminants[confirmed_importance_allcontaminants$decision == "Confirmed", ]
ggplot(confirmed_importance_allcontaminants, aes(x = reorder(rownames(confirmed_importance_allcontaminants), meanImp), y = meanImp)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "red") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Importance of Confirmed Genera by Boruta - All contaminants",
       x = "Features",
       y = "Mean Importance")
```

## 16.5 Filter the salter_cluster dataframes based on the genera ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_cluster1_filt <- salter_nocontaminants_cluster1[, c(genus_nocontaminants_confirmed)]
salter_nocontaminants_cluster2_filt <- salter_nocontaminants_cluster2[, c(genus_nocontaminants_confirmed)]

salter_consensus_cluster1_filt <- salter_consensus_cluster1[, c(genus_consensus_confirmed)]
salter_consensus_cluster2_filt <- salter_consensus_cluster2[, c(genus_consensus_confirmed)]

salter_allcontaminants_cluster1_filt <- salter_allcontaminants_cluster1[, c(genus_allcontaminants_confirmed)]
salter_allcontaminants_cluster2_filt <- salter_allcontaminants_cluster2[, c(genus_allcontaminants_confirmed)]
```

## 16.6 Get all the ColSums as a dataframe and bind by rows for each dataframe ----

```{r}
salter_nocontaminants_cluster1_filt_totals <- as.data.frame(colSums(salter_nocontaminants_cluster1_filt))
salter_nocontaminants_cluster2_filt_totals <- as.data.frame(colSums(salter_nocontaminants_cluster2_filt))
salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals <- merge(salter_nocontaminants_cluster1_filt_totals, salter_nocontaminants_cluster2_filt_totals, by="row.names", all = TRUE)
rownames(salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals) <- salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals$Row.names
salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals <- salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals[,-1]
colnames(salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals) <- c("Cluster1", "Cluster2")

salter_consensus_cluster1_filt_totals <- as.data.frame(colSums(salter_consensus_cluster1_filt))
salter_consensus_cluster2_filt_totals <- as.data.frame(colSums(salter_consensus_cluster2_filt))
salter_consensus_filt_totals <- merge(salter_consensus_cluster1_filt_totals, salter_consensus_cluster2_filt_totals, by="row.names", all = TRUE)
rownames(salter_consensus_filt_totals) <- salter_consensus_filt_totals$Row.names
salter_consensus_filt_totals <- salter_consensus_filt_totals[,-1]
colnames(salter_consensus_filt_totals) <- c("Cluster1", "Cluster2")

salter_allcontaminants_cluster1_filt_totals <- as.data.frame(colSums(salter_allcontaminants_cluster1_filt))
salter_allcontaminants_cluster2_filt_totals <- as.data.frame(colSums(salter_allcontaminants_cluster2_filt))
salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals <- merge(salter_allcontaminants_cluster1_filt_totals, salter_allcontaminants_cluster2_filt_totals, by="row.names", all = TRUE)
rownames(salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals) <- salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals$Row.names
salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals <- salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals[,-1]
colnames(salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals) <- c("Cluster1", "Cluster2")
```

## 16.7 Plot this in a barplot ----
For each dataframe define how many are in clusters 1 and 2 before plotting

```{r}
nocontaminants_cluster1 <- 23
nocontaminants_cluster2 <- 21
salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster1 <- salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster1/nocontaminants_cluster1*100
salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster2 <- salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster2/nocontaminants_cluster2*100
salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals$Genus <- rownames(salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals)
salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals_melted <- melt(salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals, id.vars = "Genus", variable.name = "Cluster", value.name = "Percentage")
ggplot(salter_nocontaminants_filt_totals_melted, aes(x = Genus, y = Percentage, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Percentage of Genus in Clusters - No Contaminants",
       x = "Genus",
       y = "Percentage of Samples",
       fill = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


consensus_cluster1 <- 23
consensus_cluster2 <- 21
salter_consensus_filt_totals$Cluster1 <- salter_consensus_filt_totals$Cluster1/consensus_cluster1*100
salter_consensus_filt_totals$Cluster2 <- salter_consensus_filt_totals$Cluster2/consensus_cluster2*100
salter_consensus_filt_totals$Genus <- rownames(salter_consensus_filt_totals)
salter_consensus_filt_totals_melted <- melt(salter_consensus_filt_totals, id.vars = "Genus", variable.name = "Cluster", value.name = "Percentage")
ggplot(salter_consensus_filt_totals_melted, aes(x = Genus, y = Percentage, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Percentage of Genus in Clusters - Consensus",
       x = "Genus",
       y = "Percentage of Samples",
       fill = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

allcontaminants_cluster1 <- 21
allcontaminants_cluster2 <- 23
salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster1 <- salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster1/allcontaminants_cluster1*100
salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster2 <- salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals$Cluster2/allcontaminants_cluster2*100
salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals$Genus <- rownames(salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals)
salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals_melted <- melt(salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals, id.vars = "Genus", variable.name = "Cluster", value.name = "Percentage")
ggplot(salter_allcontaminants_filt_totals_melted, aes(x = Genus, y = Percentage, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Percentage of Genus in Clusters - All Contaminants",
       x = "Genus",
       y = "Percentage of Samples",
       fill = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

# 17. Survival Analysis based on Clusters ----
## 17.1 Consider date of progression and not death ----

```{r}
metadata_nodeath <- read.csv("Metadata_16SDataset_NoDeath.csv", row.names=1)

metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$date_of_death <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$date_of_death, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression_Date <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression_Date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$last_follow_up_date <- as.Date(metadata_nodeath$last_follow_up_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
metadata_nodeath$days_to_last_follow_up <- metadata_nodeath$last_follow_up_date - metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment
metadata_nodeath$days_to_progression <- metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression_Date - metadata_nodeath$date_of_enrollment

table(metadata_nodeath$vital_status)
table(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression)

metadata_nodeath$progressed <- ifelse(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression == "Progressed", TRUE, FALSE)
table(metadata_nodeath$progressed)
metadata_nodeath$overall_progression_free <- ifelse(metadata_nodeath$Overall_Progression == "Not_Progressed",
                                                    metadata_nodeath$days_to_last_follow_up,
                                                    metadata_nodeath$days_to_progression)
```

HILA samples Metadata 

```{r}
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath <- metadata_nodeath %>% filter(rownames(metadata_nodeath) %in% hila_samples)
```

## 17.2 Add cluster data to the samples for each of the dataframes ----

```{r}
clusters_nocontaminants.df <- as.data.frame(kmeans_nocontaminants$cluster)
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants <- merge(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath, clusters_nocontaminants.df, by = "row.names")
rownames(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants) <- hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$Row.names
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$Row.names <- NULL
colnames(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants)[47] <- "Cluster"

clusters_consensus.df <- as.data.frame(kmeans_consensus$cluster)
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus <- merge(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath, clusters_consensus.df, by = "row.names")
rownames(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus) <- hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$Row.names
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$Row.names <- NULL
colnames(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus)[47] <- "Cluster"

clusters_allcontaminants.df <- as.data.frame(kmeans_allcontaminants$cluster)
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants <- merge(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath, clusters_allcontaminants.df, by = "row.names")
rownames(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants) <- hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$Row.names
hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$Row.names <- NULL
colnames(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants)[47] <- "Cluster"
```

## 17.3 Fit the Survival Curve to Progression ----

```{r}
survfit_nocontaminants_nodeath <- survfit(Surv(overall_progression_free, progressed) ~ Cluster, data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants)
survfit_nocontaminants_nodeath
ggsurvplot(survfit_nocontaminants_nodeath,
           data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants,
           pval = TRUE,
           risk.table = TRUE)

survfit_consensus_nodeath <- survfit(Surv(overall_progression_free, progressed) ~ Cluster, data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus)
survfit_consensus_nodeath
ggsurvplot(survfit_consensus_nodeath,
           data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus,
           pval = TRUE,
           risk.table = TRUE)

survfit_allcontaminants_nodeath <- survfit(Surv(overall_progression_free, progressed) ~ Cluster, data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants)
survfit_allcontaminants_nodeath
ggsurvplot(survfit_allcontaminants_nodeath,
           data = hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants,
           pval = TRUE,
           risk.table = TRUE)
```

# 18. Fit the Survfit object back into Boruta ----
## 18.1 This step has already been done in 14.1 ----
## 18.2 This step has already been done in 14.2 ----
## 18.3 Survival Object ----

```{r}
survival_obj_clusters_nocontaminants <- Surv(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$overall_progression_free,
                                             hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_nocontaminants$progressed)
survival_obj_clusters_consensus <- Surv(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$overall_progression_free,
                                        hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_consensus$progressed)
survival_obj_clusters_allcontaminants <- Surv(hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free,
                                              hila_samples_metadata_nodeath_allcontaminants$progressed)
```

## 18.4 Boruta Using SurvFit object ----

```{r}
boruta_nocontaminant_survfit <- Boruta(nocontaminants_subset, survival_obj_clusters_nocontaminants, 
                                       pValue = 0.05, maxRuns = 10000, doTrace = 2)

boruta_consensus_survfit <- Boruta(consensus_subset, survival_obj_clusters_consensus, 
                                       pValue = 0.05, maxRuns = 10000, doTrace = 2)

boruta_allcontaminants_survfit <- Boruta(allcontaminants_subset, survival_obj_clusters_allcontaminants, 
                                       pValue = 0.05, maxRuns = 10000, doTrace = 2)

boruta_clusters_nocontaminants_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_nocontaminant_survfit$finalDecision)
boruta_clusters_consensus_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_consensus_survfit$finalDecision)
boruta_clusters_allcontaminants_finaldecision <- as.data.frame(boruta_allcontaminants_survfit$finalDecision)
```


# 19. Winkia Survival Curve ----
## 19.1 No contaminants Dataframe

```{r}
winkia_subset_nocontaminants <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_nocontaminants$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_nocontaminants$progressed),
                                              Winkia = c(combined_data_nocontaminants$Winkia))
winkia_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_nocontaminants))
rownames(winkia_subset_nocontaminants) <- winkia_rownames

winkia_subset_nocontaminants$Progressed <- as.numeric(winkia_subset_nocontaminants$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 19.1.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
winkia_nocontaminants_surv_object <- Surv(time = winkia_subset_nocontaminants$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = winkia_subset_nocontaminants$Progressed)
```

### 19.1.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
winkia_nocontaminants_fit <- survfit(winkia_nocontaminants_surv_object ~ Winkia, data = winkia_subset_nocontaminants)
```

### 19.1.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(winkia_nocontaminants_fit, data = winkia_subset_nocontaminants, 
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Winkia Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```
Stick the table of how many samples are Winkia positive

## 19.2 Consensus Dataframe

```{r}
winkia_subset_consensus <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_consensus$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_consensus$progressed),
                                              Winkia = c(combined_data_consensus$Winkia))
winkia_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_consensus))
rownames(winkia_subset_consensus) <- winkia_rownames

winkia_subset_consensus$Progressed <- as.numeric(winkia_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 19.2.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
winkia_consensus_surv_object <- Surv(time = winkia_subset_consensus$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = winkia_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

### 19.2.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
winkia_consensus_fit <- survfit(winkia_consensus_surv_object ~ Winkia, data = winkia_subset_consensus)
```

### 19.2.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(winkia_consensus_fit, data = winkia_subset_consensus, 
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Winkia Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```

## 19.3 All contaminants Dataframe

```{r}
winkia_subset_allcontaminants <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free), 
                                           Progressed = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed),
                                           Winkia = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$Winkia))
winkia_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_allcontaminants))
rownames(winkia_subset_allcontaminants) <- winkia_rownames

winkia_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed <- as.numeric(winkia_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 19.3.1. Create a Surv object

```{r}
winkia_allcontaminants_surv_object <- Surv(time = winkia_subset_allcontaminants$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = winkia_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

### 19.3.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
winkia_allcontaminants_fit <- survfit(winkia_allcontaminants_surv_object ~ Winkia, data = winkia_subset_allcontaminants)
```

### 19.3.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(winkia_allcontaminants_fit, data = winkia_subset_allcontaminants, 
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Winkia Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```


# 20. Acinetobacter Survival Curve ----
## 20.1 Consensus Dataframe

```{r}
acinetobacter_subset_consensus <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_consensus$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_consensus$progressed),
                                              Acinetobacter = c(combined_data_consensus$Acinetobacter))
acinetobacter_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_consensus))
rownames(acinetobacter_subset_consensus) <- acinetobacter_rownames

acinetobacter_subset_consensus$Progressed <- as.numeric(acinetobacter_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 19.1.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
acinetobacter_consensus_surv_object <- Surv(time = acinetobacter_subset_consensus$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = acinetobacter_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

### 19.1.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
acinetobacter_consensus_fit <- survfit(acinetobacter_consensus_surv_object ~ Acinetobacter, data = acinetobacter_subset_consensus)
```

### 19.1.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(acinetobacter_consensus_fit, data = acinetobacter_subset_consensus,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Acinetobacter Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```

## 20.2 All Contaminant Dataframe

```{r}
acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed),
                                              Acinetobacter = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$Acinetobacter))
acinetobacter_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_allcontaminants))
rownames(acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants) <- acinetobacter_rownames

acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed <- as.numeric(acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 20.2.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
acinetobacter_allcontaminants_surv_object <- Surv(time = acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

### 20.2.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
acinetobacter_allcontaminants_fit <- survfit(acinetobacter_allcontaminants_surv_object ~ Acinetobacter, data = acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants)
```

### 20.2.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(acinetobacter_allcontaminants_fit, data = acinetobacter_subset_allcontaminants,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Acinetobacter Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```

# 21. Veillonella Survival Curve ----
## 21.1 Consensus Dataframe

```{r}
veillonella_subset_consensus <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_consensus$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_consensus$progressed),
                                              Veillonella = c(combined_data_consensus$Veillonella))
veillonella_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_consensus))
rownames(veillonella_subset_consensus) <- veillonella_rownames

veillonella_subset_consensus$Progressed <- as.numeric(veillonella_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 21.1.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
veillonella_consensus_surv_object <- Surv(time = veillonella_subset_consensus$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = veillonella_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

### 21.1.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
veillonella_consensus_fit <- survfit(veillonella_consensus_surv_object ~ Veillonella, data = veillonella_subset_consensus)
```

### 21.1.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(veillonella_consensus_fit, data = veillonella_subset_consensus,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Veillonella Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```

## 21.2 All Contaminant Dataframe

```{r}
veillonella_subset_allcontaminants <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed),
                                              Veillonella = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$Veillonella))
veillonella_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_allcontaminants))
rownames(veillonella_subset_allcontaminants) <- veillonella_rownames

veillonella_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed <- as.numeric(veillonella_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 20.2.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
veillonella_allcontaminants_surv_object <- Surv(time = veillonella_subset_allcontaminants$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = veillonella_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

### 20.2.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
veillonella_allcontaminants_fit <- survfit(veillonella_allcontaminants_surv_object ~ Veillonella, data = veillonella_subset_allcontaminants)
```

### 20.2.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(veillonella_allcontaminants_fit, data = veillonella_subset_allcontaminants,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Veillonella Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```


# 22. Prevotella Survival Curve (PERFect) ----
## 22.1 Consensus Dataframe

```{r}
prevotella_subset_consensus <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_consensus$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_consensus$progressed),
                                              Prevotella = c(combined_data_consensus$Prevotella))
prevotella_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_consensus))
rownames(prevotella_subset_consensus) <- prevotella_rownames

prevotella_subset_consensus$Progressed <- as.numeric(prevotella_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 22.1.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
prevotella_consensus_surv_object <- Surv(time = prevotella_subset_consensus$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = prevotella_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

### 22.1.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
prevotella_consensus_fit <- survfit(prevotella_consensus_surv_object ~ Prevotella, data = prevotella_subset_consensus)
```

### 22.1.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(prevotella_consensus_fit, data = prevotella_subset_consensus,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Prevotella Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```


## 22.2 All Contaminant Dataframe

```{r}
prevotella_subset_allcontaminants <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed),
                                              Prevotella = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$Prevotella))
prevotella_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_allcontaminants))
rownames(prevotella_subset_allcontaminants) <- prevotella_rownames

prevotella_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed <- as.numeric(prevotella_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 22.2.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
prevotella_allcontaminants_surv_object <- Surv(time = prevotella_subset_allcontaminants$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = prevotella_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

### 22.2.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
prevotella_allcontaminants_fit <- survfit(prevotella_allcontaminants_surv_object ~ Prevotella, data = prevotella_subset_allcontaminants)
```

### 22.2.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(prevotella_allcontaminants_fit, data = prevotella_subset_allcontaminants,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Prevotella Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```


# 23. Enterococcus Survival Curve (PERFect) ----
## 23.1 Consensus Dataframe

```{r}
enterococcus_subset_consensus <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_consensus$overall_progression_free), 
                                              Progressed = c(combined_data_consensus$progressed),
                                              Enterococcus = c(combined_data_consensus$Enterococcus))
enterococcus_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_consensus))
rownames(enterococcus_subset_consensus) <- enterococcus_rownames

enterococcus_subset_consensus$Progressed <- as.numeric(enterococcus_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 23.1.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
enterococcus_consensus_surv_object <- Surv(time = enterococcus_subset_consensus$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = enterococcus_subset_consensus$Progressed)
```

### 23.1.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
enterococcus_consensus_fit <- survfit(enterococcus_consensus_surv_object ~ Enterococcus, data = enterococcus_subset_consensus)
```

### 23.1.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(enterococcus_consensus_fit, data = enterococcus_subset_consensus,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Enterococcus Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```

## 23.2 All Contaminant Dataframe

```{r}
enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants <- data.frame(Overall_Progression_free = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$overall_progression_free), 
                                        Progressed = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$progressed),
                                        Enterococcus = c(combined_data_allcontaminants$Enterococcus))
enterococcus_rownames <- c(rownames(combined_data_allcontaminants))
rownames(enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants) <- enterococcus_rownames

enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed <- as.numeric(enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

1 - No progression 2- Progressed
### 23.2.1 Create a Surv object

```{r}
enterococcus_allcontaminants_surv_object <- Surv(time = enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants$Overall_Progression_free, 
                                          event = enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants$Progressed)
```

### 23.2.2 Fit the Kaplan-Meier survival curve by Winkia status

```{r}
enterococcus_allcontaminants_fit <- survfit(enterococcus_allcontaminants_surv_object ~ Enterococcus, data = enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants)
```

### 23.2.3 Plot the survival curve

```{r}
ggsurvplot(enterococcus_allcontaminants_fit, data = enterococcus_subset_allcontaminants,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Enterococcus Status",
           legend.labs = c("Absent (0)", "Present (1)"),
           xlab = "Progression-Free Days",
           ylab = "Survival Probability",
           ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```

# 24. RELATIVE ABUNDANCE PIPELINE ----
Relative Abundance Pipeline based on previous work done to produce Wilcoxon Plots
## 24.1 No contaminant Dataframe
### 24.1.1 Finding the ideal number of clusters for the cancer samples ----
Using the dataframes generated in 6.1.1
``` {r}

class(salter_nocontaminants.rel)
salter_nocontaminants.rel_matrix <- as.matrix(salter_nocontaminants.rel)
dist_matrix_genus_nocontaminants <- dist(salter_nocontaminants.rel_matrix, method = "manhattan")
pcoa_genus_nocontaminants <- pcoa(dist_matrix_genus_nocontaminants, correction = "none", rn = NULL)
biplot_genus_nocontaminants <- biplot.pcoa(pcoa_genus_nocontaminants, plot.axes = c(1,2), dir.axis1=1, dir.axis2=1, rn = NULL, main = "PCOA Plot for No Contaminant Dataframe")
biplot_genus_nocontaminants

fviz_nbclust(salter_nocontaminants.rel, kmeans, method='silhouette') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_nocontaminants.rel, kmeans, method='gap_stat') 
fviz_nbclust(salter_nocontaminants.rel, kmeans, method='wss') 

#There is no real separation with the no contaminants dataframe so I might just go with 2

#Optimal Number of Clusters - 2 
```

### 24.1.2 PCOA plot with clusters and co-ordinates

```{r}
set.seed(198)
gap_stat <- clusGap(salter_nocontaminants.rel, FUN = kmeans, nstart = 25,
                    K.max = 10, B = 50)
print(gap_stat, method = "firstmax")

pcoa_genus_nocontaminants$vectors
pcoa_coords_nocontaminants <- as.data.frame(pcoa_genus_nocontaminants$vectors)
head(pcoa_coords_nocontaminants)
pcoa_coords_final1 <- as.data.frame(pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.1)
pcoa_coords_final2 <- as.data.frame(pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.2)
pcoa_coords_genus_final <- cbind(pcoa_coords_final1, pcoa_coords_final2)

kmeans_genus <- kmeans(pcoa_coords_genus_final, 2, nstart = 20)
kmeans_genus
kmeans_plot <- plot(pcoa_coords_genus_final, col = (kmeans_genus$cluster + 1), main = "K-Means Clustering of Samples - September 2023 and May 2022", xlab = "", ylab = "", pch = 20, cex = 2)
kmeans_plot

kmeans_clusterdata <- as.data.frame(kmeans_genus$cluster)
sample_list <- cbind(kmeans_clusterdata, pcoa_coords_genus_final)
head(sample_list)
rownames(salter_nocontaminants.rel)
rownames(sample_list) <- rownames(salter_nocontaminants.rel)
head(sample_list)
sample_cluster_list <- cbind(sample_list, hila_samples_metadata_nodeath)
head(sample_cluster_list)
write.csv(file = "HILA_Sample_Cluster_List.csv", sample_cluster_list)
ggplot(sample_cluster_list, aes(x=pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.1, y=pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.2, color = progressed)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) + geom_text(aes(label = rownames(sample_list)))

```

### 24.1.3 Separate samples into their individual clusters and with relative abundances

```{r}
genus_abundance_clusters <- cbind(sample_list$`kmeans_genus$cluster`, salter_nocontaminants.rel)
write.csv(file = "Genus_Abundance_Cluster.csv", genus_abundance_clusters)
genus_abundance_clusters <- read.csv("Genus_Abundance_Cluster.csv", row.names = 1)

sample_cluster_coords <- as.data.frame(sample_cluster_list)[, 2:3] 
sample_cluster_coords_genus_abundance <- cbind(sample_cluster_coords, genus_abundance_clusters) 

genus_cluster1 <- sample_cluster_coords_genus_abundance %>% filter(sample_cluster_coords_genus_abundance$sample_list..kmeans_genus.cluster. == 1)
genus_cluster2 <- sample_cluster_coords_genus_abundance %>% filter(sample_cluster_coords_genus_abundance$sample_list..kmeans_genus.cluster. == 2)
```

### 24.1.4 Create a scatterplot for Cluster 1 and 2 with labels

```{r}
ggplot(genus_cluster1, aes(x = genus_cluster1$`pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.1`, y = genus_cluster1$`pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.2`, label = rownames(genus_cluster1))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(aes(label = rownames(genus_cluster1)), vjust = -0.5, size =3) +
  labs(title = "Cluster 1")

ggplot(genus_cluster2, aes(x = genus_cluster2$`pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.1`, y = genus_cluster2$`pcoa_coords_nocontaminants$Axis.2`, label = rownames(genus_cluster2))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(aes(label = rownames(genus_cluster2)), vjust = -0.5, size =3) +
  labs(title = "Cluster 2")

```

### 24.1.4 Boxplots for the two clusters

